description: This file defines affirmative sentences in the Going-to Future construction in Njo Viri (Balanda). The construction expresses planned or intended future actions using the motion verb 'tiyai' followed by the directional marker 'va' and a base verb.

general_principle.statement: Going-to future in Balanda is formed with the present copula 'no', the motion verb 'tiyai' (go), the directional connector 'va', and a base verb expressing the intended action.

affirmative_structure.structure: Subject + no + tiyai + va + Verb(base) + (Object / Complement)
affirmative_structure.description: Used to express a planned or intended future action.
constraints: The copula 'no' must appear after the subject
The verb 'tiyai' must remain in base motion form
The connector 'va' must link 'tiyai' to the following base verb
The final verb must remain in base form without tense or aspect marking

semantic_function.meaning: planned, intended, or expected future action
semantic_function.contrast_with_future_simple: Future simple with 'le-' expresses neutral future, while 'tiyai va' expresses intention or plan.

error_constraints: Do not attach tense markers like 'le-' to the final verb
Do not use progressive 'ti-' on the final verb
Do not add 'dheki' in going-to affirmatives

balanda: Ne no tiyai va ja se
english: I am going to eat fish

balanda: Ni no tiyai va nzü ngo
english: She is going to drink water

balanda: Danda no tiyai va teli muru famvara
english: We are going to sleep on the bed

balanda: Uku no tiyai va yai
english: Uku is going to go

balanda: Ngande no tiyai va dhii ba
english: Ngande is going to come home

balanda: Ndi no tiyai va nonö gbi difo
english: They are going to walk in the compound

balanda: Ni no tiyai va nangele zanga
english: She is going to run fast

balanda: Uku no tiyai va mande gbi njü
english: Uku is going to work in the garden

balanda: Wiki no tiyai va moliki gbi difo
english: The child is going to play in the compound

balanda: Ne no tiyai va loro voro
english: I am going to watch the dog

balanda: Ne no tiyai va vele njo balanda
english: I am going to speak Balanda

balanda: Wilii no tiyai va sudi kavoso
english: The girl is going to write words

balanda: Ne no tiyai va dheke kitabu
english: I am going to read a book

balanda: Ni no tiyai va teri ay
english: He is going to think about it

balanda: Ndi no tiyai va ŋiyi ay
english: They are going to know it

balanda: Ne no tiyai va we ndi
english: I am going to ask them

balanda: Ngande no tiyai va vele zi ndi
english: Ngande is going to tell them

balanda: Wilii no tiyai va keye ti naa ni
english: The girl is going to call her mother

balanda: Ne no tiyai va merego ŋo
english: I am going to love you

balanda: Ni no tiyai va maguku ti kpörö
english: He is going to fear the snake

balanda: Ni no tiyai va sogo ni
english: She is going to hate him

balanda: Ngande no tiyai va riki ni
english: Ngande is going to surprise him

balanda: Ni no tiyai va dovee kurru
english: He is going to seem calm

balanda: Wilii no tiyai va yele tamma
english: The girl is going to tie the shoe

balanda: Ni no tiyai va di kalla
english: He is going to cut the pot

balanda: Ne no tiyai va tele njokoji
english: I am going to pull the door

balanda: Danda no tiyai va turu songo
english: We are going to push the box

balanda: Wilii no tiyai va soko tamma
english: The girl is going to wash the shoe

balanda: Ne no tiyai va kuru kavokau
english: I am going to hide the beads

balanda: Ngande no tiyai va ngö tiyi
english: Ngande is going to build a house

balanda: Ne no tiyai va suru kavoso
english: I am going to create words

balanda: Ni no tiyai va giri kavoso
english: She is going to change the words

balanda: Ne no tiyai va kara njokoji
english: I am going to turn the door

balanda: Danda no tiyai va toko villi
english: We are going to add money

balanda: Ne no tiyai va kefo Balanda
english: I am going to describe Balanda

balanda: Ndi no tiyai va konu nvesani
english: They are going to help the poor

balanda: Ngande no tiyai va ndugu mira
english: Ngande is going to initiate the project

balanda: Ne no tiyai va maforo mira
english: I am going to contribute to the project

balanda: Wilii no tiyai va sarwa kumere
english: The girl is going to separate trash

balanda: Danda no tiyai va kiri tidina
english: We are going to uphold the law

balanda: Ne no tiyai va duru ngo
english: I am going to want water

balanda: Ni no tiyai va ze villi
english: She is going to give money

balanda: Ne no tiyai va dhe villi
english: I am going to find money

balanda: Uku no tiyai va mele vongu
english: Uku is going to try the cloth

balanda: Ngande no tiyai va si ba
english: Ngande is going to leave home

balanda: Ne no tiyai va lu Wau
english: I am going to arrive in Wau

balanda: Ni no tiyai va fagi mva
english: He is going to sharpen the knife

balanda: Ngande no tiyai va dewe kakpodu
english: Ngande is going to imitate adults

balanda: Danda no tiyai va bita mira
english: We are going to start the project

balanda: Ni no tiyai va teta
english: He is going to fall
